polyline.style: fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 2; --darkreader-inline-fill: none; --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-000000, #e8e6e3);

path.style: fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 2; --darkreader-inline-fill: none; --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-000000, #e8e6e3);
